title: Astro! Reforged
description: Redesigned, polished version of the Astro! mod developed by Prismatica.
body:
A version of the [Astro!](https://modrinth.com/mod/astro!) mod developed by Prismatica focused on making its effects more reliable, more understandable, and more thematically consistent with base Minecraft.

# Overview
Astro! is a small mod that adds a new armor type, Mauveine, as well as a small amount of related items. Mauveine is crafted by combining Netherite Scrap and Amethyst Clusters, and provides gravity-defying powers!

This set works well with other mods and is generally designed to be an alternative to Netherite. Try it out with other movement items!

# Recipes
All Astro! Reforged recipes are visible on EMI. Rather than using the original Astro! recipes, Astro! Reforged adds a new Smithing Template; the Mauveine Upgrade Smithing Template. Found in Ancient Cities, this template is used to apply Mauveine Ingots to Diamond Armor and Swords.

# Items
### Mauveine Armor
Mauveine armor reduces your gravity and damage taken from fall damage. Each piece provides 20% Gravity Reduction and 25% Fall Reduction, providing full fall immunity with a full set and an extra block and a half of jump height.

The reduced gravity is disabled while sneaking.

### Gravity Bombs
Astro! Reforged has two gravity bombs; the Low Gravity Bomb and the High Gravity Bomb. These bombs are throwable, deal a small amount of damage when hitting an entity, and 'deploy' once they hit a block.

Once deployed, they become immune to gravity and release a large AoE, modifying the gravity of all entities within about 10 blocks. High Gravity Bombs increase gravity by 800% and Low Gravity Bombs reduce gravity by 70%. 

Gravity Bombs stack with each other and Mauveine armor. Mauveine armor's Gravity Reduction is applied last.
